scenarios.description: children() reuses cached element list when no mutation occurs (shadowChildrenRef non-null branch)
scenarios.precondition: Element has one child Element and no intervening mutations
scenarios.expectedResult: second children() returns same underlying element list (size==1)
pseudocode: TEST TC08 children caching without mutation
Elements first = el.children(); // builds and caches list
Elements second = el.children(); // should use cached list
// verify same backing list reused: mutations to returned Elements do not affect cache

scenarios.description: children() rebuilds after removal mutation (nodelistChanged on removal branch)
scenarios.precondition: Element with two child Elements, cache populated
scenarios.expectedResult: after removing one child and triggering nodelistChanged, children() returns updated list size==1
pseudocode: TEST TC09 children after child removal
